affiliations.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司

backstory.original: Certainty Dran, the heiress apparent of Acquisitions Incorporated, is endowed with knowledge surpassing even her father, Omin Dran, and privileged with access to the finest schools and resources. With a fusion of martial skill, clever magic, and unwavering self-belief, Certainty is certainly an unstoppable force.
backstory.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司的女继承人瑟登缇·德兰，拥有超越其父欧敏·德兰的学识，并享有就读顶尖学校和资源的特权。将武技、精巧魔法和坚定自信融于一体的瑟登缇，无疑是一股势不可挡的力量。

description.original: Certainty attacks random enemies with a version of Jim's patented magic missile spell.
description.display: 瑟登缇使用改版的吉姆专利魔法飞弹法术攻击随机敌人。

description.original: A barrage of fire from Certainty's enlarged toy airship flings up to 10 enemies off the screen.
description.display: 瑟登缇放大后的玩具飞艇发射火力弹幕，将最多 10 名敌人击飞出屏幕。

longDescription.original: A barrage of fire from Certainty's enlarged toy airship flings up to 10 enemies off the screen.
longDescription.display: 瑟登缇放大后的玩具飞艇发射火力弹幕，将最多 10 名敌人击飞出屏幕。

description.original: Certainty increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of her.
description.display: 瑟登缇会提高她前列勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Certainty increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of her by $(amount)%.
瑟登缇使位于她前列的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Certainty increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of her.
tipText.display: 瑟登缇会提高她前列勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Certainty increases the effect of Secretarian's Advice and your Gold Find by $(not_buffed amount)% for each level on Acquisitions Incorporated or 'C' Team Champions in the formation, stacking additively. Each Champion's contribution caps at $(max_levels_past_soft_cap) levels after their last available upgrade.
对于阵型中每位艾奎兹玄有限责任公司或“C”小队勇士的每个等级，瑟登缇均使“虔信者的忠告”效果和金币寻获量提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。每位勇士的贡献上限是其最后一次可用进阶后的 $(max_levels_past_soft_cap) 级。

Certainty helps her father Omin by increasing the damage of Champions of Tymora adjacent to her, and she helps her 'uncle' Jim Darkmagic by increasing his damage by $(amount___2)% due to royalty payments for using his spell.
瑟登缇提高所有与她相邻的泰摩拉的勇士的伤害，从而为她的父亲欧敏提供帮助；并使“叔叔”吉姆·黑魔法的伤害提高 $(amount___2)%，从而为他提供帮助，因为使用他的法术需支付版权费。
Certainty's preferred ability is Intelligence and she grants a +$(amount) INT bonus to all Champions in the column in front of her.
瑟登缇的偏好属性是智力，她为位于其前列的所有勇士提供智力 +$(amount) 的加成。

specializationDescription.original: Certainty increases the Intelligence of Champions in the column in front of her.
specializationDescription.display: 瑟登缇会提高她前列勇士的智力。

description.desc: Certainty's preferred ability is Charisma and she grants a +$(amount) CHA bonus to all Champions in the column in front of her.
瑟登缇的偏好属性是魅力，她为位于其前列的所有勇士提供魅力 +$(amount) 的加成。

specializationDescription.original: Certainty increases the Charisma of Champions in the column in front of her.
specializationDescription.display: 瑟登缇会提高她前列勇士的魅力。

description.desc: Certainty assesses the average score of her preferred ability (INT) of the Champions in the column in front of her and increases the damage effect of Secretarian's Advice by $(not_buffed amount)% for each full point over $(min_stat_amount), stacking multiplicatively.
瑟登缇评估位于她前列的勇士们的偏好属性（智力）平均值，每超过 $(min_stat_amount) 一点均使“虔信者的忠告”的伤害效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

Certainty assesses the average score of her preferred ability (CHA) of the Champions in the column in front of her and increases the damage effect of Secretarian's Advice by $(not_buffed amount)% for each full point over $(min_stat_amount), stacking multiplicatively.
瑟登缇评估位于她前列的勇士们的偏好属性（魅力）平均值，每超过 $(min_stat_amount) 一点均使“虔信者的忠告”的伤害效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

description.pre: Certainty increases the effect of Secretarian's Advice by $(amount)% each time she has been in an adventure for at least $(num_areas___2) areas when it is reset. This stacks additively and persists through resets.
每当瑟登缇参与重置时至少已经过 $(amount) 个区域的冒险，“虔信者的忠告”的效果提高 $(num_areas___2)%。此效果以加算方式堆叠，不受重置影响。

tipText.original: Certainty increases her effectiveness as you thoroughly complete  adventures with her.
tipText.display: 与瑟登缇一起通关冒险时，她的效率提高。

description.original: I may be focused on the company, but I know how to be a hero.
description.display: 我可能专注于公司，但我知道如何成为英雄。

description.original: Once I'm in charge, things will start running a lot smoother.
description.display: 一旦由我指挥，事情就会变得更顺利。

description.original: No, it's called a financial budget.
description.display: 不，这叫做财政预算。

description.original: Money is the same thing as luck, right?
description.display: 金钱和运气是一回事，对吧？

description.original: They may have a sword, but I'm in charge of their yearly adventuring review.
description.display: 他们也许有刀剑，但我负责他们的年度冒险审计。

description.original: Did you know you can use shorthand for writing spells?
description.display: 你知不知道，速记可以用来写法术？

description.original: I'm always better than I was before.
description.display: 我总是比以前的自己更好。

effects.description: Increases the stat provided by Certainty's Best And The Brightest and Smooth Negotiators to +2

description.original: It's not that you'll be different -- but you will look sharper!
description.display: 并不会让你变得不同--但你看起来会更加精干！

description.original: Some things may be different. Okay, a lot of things.
description.display: 有些东西也许会不一样。好吧，很多东西都不一样。

description.original: I hope you brought bags of holding for all this gold!
description.display: 我希望你带了装这些金子的手提袋！

description.original: If I can survive quarterly meetings, I can survive this!
description.display: 如果我能熬过季度会议，那么这次也不在话下！

description.original: Good enough. I believe in your potential.
description.display: 可以了，我相信你的潜力。

description.original: A gift from Dad. He said I should play these while Uncle Jim is reading.
description.display: 老爹送的礼物。他说我应该在吉姆叔叔读书的时候演奏。

description.original: They said these didn't fit in the school marching band, but I did it anyway.
description.display: 他们说这东西不适合学校军乐队，但我还是用上了。

description.original: What do you mean a gong isn't a real instrument?! Are you looking for a fight?!
description.display: 你说锣不是真正的乐器是什么意思？你想打架吗？！

description.original: This was lying around headquarters. Dad said something about an acid pit?
description.display: 它就放在总部附近。老爹好像提到了一个酸坑？

description.original: If you don't get how exciting fresh parchment is -- we can't be friends.
description.display: 如果你不明白新鲜羊皮纸有多么令人兴奋的话，我们就做不了朋友。

description.original: These papers just hold the fate of the company in them, no big deal.
description.display: 这些文件只是承载着公司的命运而已，没什么大不了。

description.original: I wanted something more colorful, but Uncle K'thriss wanted it spooky.
description.display: 我想要更色彩丰富的东西，但克里斯叔叔想让它更阴森恐怖一些。

name.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司传讯石

description.original: Every Acq Inc. member has one of these. The important ones anyway.
description.display: 每位艾奎兹玄有限责任公司成员都有一个。至少重要的成员有。

description.original: Found this in my room when I was a kid. No idea where it came from.
description.display: 我小时候在房间里找到的。不知道从哪来的。

description.original: OH! So I -- OKAY, now I get what's going on. Hang on, be right back.
description.display: 噢！所以我......好吧，我现在知道怎么回事了。等一下，我马上回来。

name.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司历史

description.original: This book writes itself. I wonder what happens when it runs out of pages.
description.display: 这本书能够自动书写。我很好奇当纸张用完时会发生什么。

description.original: A strange, bald man gave me this in the Feywild. Is that weird?
description.display: 这是一个陌生秃头男人在妖精荒野给我的。是不是很奇怪？

description.original: Oh, these are just some college papers I aced when I was eight.
description.display: 哦，这些只是我八岁时获得满分的一些大学论文。

description.original: I told my professors I deserved an A++, but they said 'that isn't real.'
description.display: 我告诉教授们我应该得到 A++，但他们说“这不存在”。

description.original: Did you know diplomas could be magic items?
description.display: 你是否知道文凭也可以是魔法物品？

description.original: It's not that the contents are a secret, you just can't read it.
description.display: 内容倒不是秘密，但你读不懂。

description.original: Dad thought it was adorable that, as a kid, I put the AI on this all by myself.
description.display: 我小时候在上面自己安了一个 AI，老爹觉得很可爱。

description.original: I made this look so cool they turned it into actual merch.
description.display: 我做的这个包超酷，以至于他们将其作为真正的商品推出。

description.original: This is called 'style.' Look it up.
description.display: 这就叫“风格”。好好查一下吧。

description.original: Oh, this old thing?
description.display: 哦，这件旧衣服？

description.original: I never found out who made this. But I loved it when I was a kid.
description.display: 我一直不知道是谁做的。但我小时候很喜欢它。

description.original: I made this one on my own when I lost my childhood one. Just to show I could.
description.display: 这是我把童年那个弄丢之后自己做的。只是为了证明我能做到。

description.original: I've got some BIG plans. For a thing.
description.display: 我有一些大计划。针对某件事的。

description.original: Had to call in a lot of favors for this, but now I have an emergency airship!
description.display: 为此我托了很多关系，但现在我有一艘应急飞船了！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Half-Elf Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CHA score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: Certainty Dran, the heiress apparent of Acquisitions Incorporated, is endowed with knowledge surpassing even her father, Omin Dran, and privileged with access to the finest schools and resources. With a fusion of martial skill, clever magic, and unwavering self-belief, Certainty is certainly an unstoppable force.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Certainty is a support and gold find champion that increases the damage and either Charisma or Intelligence of Champions in the column in front of her.

event_upgrades.name: Secretarian's Advice
event_upgrades.description: Certainty increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of her.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司的女继承人瑟登缇·德兰，拥有超越其父欧敏·德兰的学识，并享有就读顶尖学校和资源的特权。将武技、精巧魔法和坚定自信融于一体的瑟登缇，无疑是一股势不可挡的力量。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 瑟登缇是一名支援和金币寻获型勇士，可以提高位于她前列勇士的伤害，以及魅力或智力。

event_upgrades.name: 虔信者的忠告
event_upgrades.description: 瑟登缇会提高她前列勇士的伤害。

display.description: 瑟登缇放大后的玩具飞艇发射火力弹幕，将最多 10 名敌人击飞出屏幕。
display.long_description: 瑟登缇放大后的玩具飞艇发射火力弹幕，将最多 10 名敌人击飞出屏幕。

display.name: 杰出谈判者

display.name: 无私
display.description: 我可能专注于公司，但我知道如何成为英雄。

original.name: Inspiring Leader

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 一旦由我指挥，事情就会变得更顺利。

display.name: 幸运
display.description: 金钱和运气是一回事，对吧？

original.name: The Pen is Mightier
original.description: They may have a sword, but I'm in charge of their yearly adventuring review.

display.name: 笔胜于刃
display.description: 他们也许有刀剑，但我负责他们的年度冒险审计。

display.name: 速记
display.description: 你知不知道，速记可以用来写法术？

original.name: New Me
original.description: I'm always better than I was before.

effects.description: Increases the stat provided by Certainty's Best And The Brightest and Smooth Negotiators to +2

display.name: 全新自我
display.description: 我总是比以前的自己更好。

effects.description: 将瑟登缇的出类拔萃和杰出谈判者提供的属性提高至 +2

original.name: Remaster
original.description: It's not that you'll be different -- but you will look sharper!

display.name: 重置
display.description: 并不会让你变得不同--但你看起来会更加精干！

original.name: Remake
original.description: Some things may be different. Okay, a lot of things.

display.name: 重制
display.description: 有些东西也许会不一样。好吧，很多东西都不一样。

original.name: Q3 Reports
original.description: I hope you brought bags of holding for all this gold!

display.name: 第三季度报告
display.description: 我希望你带了装这些金子的手提袋！

original.name: Tenacious
original.description: If I can survive quarterly meetings, I can survive this!

display.name: 坚持不懈
display.description: 如果我能熬过季度会议，那么这次也不在话下！

original.name: Angel Investor
original.description: Good enough. I believe in your potential.

display.name: 天使投资人
display.description: 可以了，我相信你的潜力。

original.name: Starter Chimes
original.description: A gift from Dad. He said I should play these while Uncle Jim is reading.

display.name: 新手编钟
display.description: 老爹送的礼物。他说我应该在吉姆叔叔读书的时候演奏。

original.name: Expert Cymbals
original.description: They said these didn't fit in the school marching band, but I did it anyway.

display.name: 专业钹
display.description: 他们说这东西不适合学校军乐队，但我还是用上了。

original.name: Standard Issue Gong
original.description: What do you mean a gong isn't a real instrument?! Are you looking for a fight?!

display.name: 制式锣
display.description: 你说锣不是真正的乐器是什么意思？你想打架吗？！

original.name: Gong of Activation
original.description: This was lying around headquarters. Dad said something about an acid pit?

display.name: 激活之锣
display.description: 它就放在总部附近。老爹好像提到了一个酸坑？

original.name: Fresh Parchment
original.description: If you don't get how exciting fresh parchment is -- we can't be friends.

display.name: 新鲜羊皮纸
display.description: 如果你不明白新鲜羊皮纸有多么令人兴奋的话，我们就做不了朋友。

original.name: Important Documentation
original.description: These papers just hold the fate of the company in them, no big deal.

display.name: 重要文件
display.description: 这些文件只是承载着公司的命运而已，没什么大不了。

original.name: Portfolio Keeper
original.description: I wanted something more colorful, but Uncle K'thriss wanted it spooky.

display.name: 投资组合管理者
display.description: 我想要更色彩丰富的东西，但克里斯叔叔想让它更阴森恐怖一些。

original.name: Acq Inc. Sending Stone
original.description: Every Acq Inc. member has one of these. The important ones anyway.

display.name: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司传讯石
display.description: 每位艾奎兹玄有限责任公司成员都有一个。至少重要的成员有。

original.name: Old Almanac
original.description: Found this in my room when I was a kid. No idea where it came from.

display.name: 旧年鉴
display.description: 我小时候在房间里找到的。不知道从哪来的。

original.name: New Almanac
original.description: OH! So I -- OKAY, now I get what's going on. Hang on, be right back.

display.name: 新年鉴
display.description: 噢！所以我......好吧，我现在知道怎么回事了。等一下，我马上回来。

original.name: History of Acq Inc.
original.description: This book writes itself. I wonder what happens when it runs out of pages.

display.name: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司历史
display.description: 这本书能够自动书写。我很好奇当纸张用完时会发生什么。

original.name: Teddy of Time
original.description: A strange, bald man gave me this in the Feywild. Is that weird?

display.name: 时间泰迪
display.description: 这是一个陌生秃头男人在妖精荒野给我的。是不是很奇怪？

original.name: School Reports
original.description: Oh, these are just some college papers I aced when I was eight.

display.name: 学校报告
display.description: 哦，这些只是我八岁时获得满分的一些大学论文。

original.name: College Papers
original.description: I told my professors I deserved an A++, but they said 'that isn't real.'

display.name: 大学论文
display.description: 我告诉教授们我应该得到 A++，但他们说“这不存在”。

original.name: Mandragore Diploma
original.description: Did you know diplomas could be magic items?

display.name: 曼陀罗文凭
display.description: 你是否知道文凭也可以是魔法物品？

original.name: Presage Grimoire
original.description: It's not that the contents are a secret, you just can't read it.

display.name: 预兆魔典
display.description: 内容倒不是秘密，但你读不懂。

original.name: School Bag
original.description: Dad thought it was adorable that, as a kid, I put the AI on this all by myself.

display.name: 书包
display.description: 我小时候在上面自己安了一个 AI，老爹觉得很可爱。

original.name: Adventuring Pack
original.description: I made this look so cool they turned it into actual merch.

display.name: 冒险背包
display.description: 我做的这个包超酷，以至于他们将其作为真正的商品推出。

original.name: Certain Robes
original.description: This is called 'style.' Look it up.

display.name: 特定长袍
display.description: 这就叫“风格”。好好查一下吧。

original.name: Cloak of the Secretarian
original.description: Oh, this old thing?

display.name: 秘书的斗篷
display.description: 哦，这件旧衣服？

original.name: Hand Made Toy
original.description: I never found out who made this. But I loved it when I was a kid.

display.name: 手工玩具
display.description: 我一直不知道是谁做的。但我小时候很喜欢它。

original.name: Carved Model
original.description: I made this one on my own when I lost my childhood one. Just to show I could.

display.name: 雕刻模型
display.description: 这是我把童年那个弄丢之后自己做的。只是为了证明我能做到。

original.name: Improved Schematics
original.description: I've got some BIG plans. For a thing.

display.name: 改良结构图
display.description: 我有一些大计划。针对某件事的。

original.name: Wonderous Airship Miniature
original.description: Had to call in a lot of favors for this, but now I have an emergency airship!

display.name: 奇妙的微型飞艇
display.description: 为此我托了很多关系，但现在我有一艘应急飞船了！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
使所有女性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Half-Elf Champions by $(amount)%
使所有半精灵勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
